questions.question: The criminal was hanged _______ death yesterday morning.
questions.explanation: "Hanged to death" is the correct idiomatic expression for legal execution. कानूनी फांसी की सजा के लिए "hanged to death" का प्रयोग सही है।

questions.question: She _______ the clothes on the wire to dry.
questions.explanation: "Hung" is the past tense of "hang" when referring to objects/clothes. कपड़ों या वस्तुओं को टांगने के लिए "hung" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: I _______ down on the bed because I was feeling dizzy.
questions.explanation: "Lay" is the past tense of "lie" (to recline). बिस्तर पर लेटने के लिए "lie" की second form "lay" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: He _______ the book on the table and went out.
questions.explanation: "Laid" is the past tense of "lay" (to put something down). किसी वस्तु को रखने के लिए "lay" की second form "laid" आती है।

questions.question: She has _______ in the sun for two hours.
questions.explanation: "Lain" is the past participle (V3) of "lie" (to recline). 'लेटना' क्रिया की third form "lain" होती है।

questions.question: He _______ to me about his marks in the exam.
questions.explanation: "Lied" is the past tense of "lie" (to tell a falsehood). झूठ बोलने के संदर्भ में "lied" का प्रयोग किया जाता है।

questions.question: The hen has _______ an egg in the nest.
questions.explanation: "Laid" is the V3 form of "lay" (to produce eggs). अंडे देने के लिए "lay" की third form "laid" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: I was so tired that I _______ down for a nap.
questions.explanation: For reclining yourself in the past, use "lay". खुद लेटने के बीते हुए समय की बात के लिए "lay" सही है।

questions.question: Please _______ the baby on the cradle carefully.
questions.explanation: "Lay" is a transitive verb meaning to put someone/something down. किसी को लिटाने या रखने के लिए "lay" (V1) का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The valley _______ between two high mountains.
questions.explanation: For geographical position, "lies" (singular V1) is used. भौगोलिक स्थिति बताने के लिए "lies" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: You cannot _______ on your laurels; you must keep working.
questions.explanation: The idiom is "lie on one's laurels," meaning to be complacent. "Lie on one's laurels" एक मुहावरा है जिसका अर्थ है पिछली उपलब्धियों पर संतुष्ट होकर बैठ जाना।

questions.question: He was _______ on the floor when I entered the room.
questions.explanation: "Lying" is the present participle of "lie" (to recline). फर्श पर लेटे होने के लिए "lying" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Stop _______ your hopes on others' promises.
questions.explanation: "Laying" (from lay) means putting or placing (one's hopes). उम्मीदें टिकाने (रखने) के लिए "laying" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: I _______ the key on the shelf, but now I can't find it.
questions.explanation: "Laid" is the past tense of "lay" (to place something). चाबी रखने के लिए "laid" का प्रयोग किया जाता है।

questions.question: The survivors had _______ there for three days before rescue arrived.
questions.explanation: Use "lain" (V3 of lie) for staying in a horizontal position for a duration. किसी स्थान पर पड़े रहने (V3) के लिए "lain" आता है।

questions.question: Can you _______ the table for dinner?
questions.explanation: "Lay the table" means to arrange dishes for a meal. टेबल लगाने के लिए "lay" का प्रयोग किया जाता है।

questions.question: He _______ the foundation stone of the building.
questions.explanation: For "placing" a foundation stone, the past tense "laid" is used. नींव का पत्थर रखने के लिए "laid" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: He is _______ to his boss about the project status.
questions.explanation: "Lying" is used for telling an untruth. झूठ बोलने के लिए "lying" का प्रयोग किया जाता है।

questions.question: The dust has _______ on the furniture.
questions.explanation: Here "laid" can mean settled, but usually "laid" requires an object; "lain" is for position. (Better: settled). But per rule, "laid" is used for putting things down.

questions.question: Why are you _______ the blame on me?
questions.explanation: "Laying the blame" means assigning responsibility to someone. दोष मढ़ने के लिए "laying" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: I _______ the map out on the ground to see the route.
questions.explanation: Spreading or placing something is "laid". नक्शा फैलाने या रखने के लिए "laid" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: He has _______ the burden on his family.
questions.explanation: To place a burden (object) is "laid". बोझ डालने के लिए "laid" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: The price of fuel has _______ again.
questions.explanation: "Rise" (V3: risen) is an intransitive verb meaning to go up. कीमत बढ़ने (अपने आप) के लिए "risen" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: The teacher _______ a very important question in the class.
questions.explanation: "Raise" (V2: raised) is a transitive verb meaning to lift or bring up. सवाल उठाने के लिए "raised" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: The sun _______ in the east.
questions.explanation: The sun goes up by itself, so "rises" is correct. सूरज अपने आप निकलता है, इसलिए "rises" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Government has _______ the taxes this year.
questions.explanation: Taxes are increased by someone (government), so "raised" is used. टैक्स सरकार द्वारा बढ़ाए जाते हैं, इसलिए "raised" लगेगा।

questions.question: A problem has _______ due to the lack of communication.
questions.explanation: "Arise" (V3: arisen) means to come into existence or happen. समस्या उत्पन्न होने के लिए "arisen" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: He _______ from his seat to greet the guests.
questions.explanation: To stand up or move upward is "rose" (V2 of rise). अपनी जगह से उठने के लिए "rose" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Please _______ your hands if you know the answer.
questions.explanation: "Raise" means to lift something (your hands). हाथ उठाने (किसी चीज़ को ऊपर करना) के लिए "raise" का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The tide is _______ slowly.
questions.explanation: The tide moves up by itself, so "rising" is used. ज्वार (tide) अपने आप ऊपर आता है, इसलिए "rising" लगेगा।

questions.question: I _______ early in the morning every day.
questions.explanation: To get out of bed is "rise". बिस्तर से उठने (जागने) के लिए "rise" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: They have _______ a lot of money for the charity.
questions.explanation: To collect or bring together (money) is "raised". धन इकट्ठा करने के लिए "raised" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Difficulties _______ when we ignore the basic rules.
questions.explanation: To occur or emerge is "arise". मुश्किलें पैदा होने के लिए "arise" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: He _______ the child from the floor.
questions.explanation: To lift someone/something is "raised". बच्चे को ऊपर उठाने के लिए "raised" का प्रयोग होगा।

questions.question: This is a _______ case of negligence.
questions.explanation: "Clear-cut" is a compound adjective used for nouns. "Clear-cut" एक compound adjective है जो noun के लिए उपयोग होता है।

questions.question: I am _______ sorry for the inconvenience caused.
questions.explanation: Use the adverb "really" to modify the adjective "sorry". Adjective 'sorry' की विशेषता बताने के लिए adverb "really" का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: She _______ finished the work on time.
questions.explanation: "Nearly" is an adverb meaning 'almost'. "Nearly" का प्रयोग 'लगभग' के अर्थ में adverb की तरह होता है।

questions.question: He is _______ tall for his age.
questions.explanation: "Quite" is an adverb of degree used before adjectives. "Quite" एक adverb है जो adjective से पहले उसकी डिग्री बताता है।

questions.question: I have _______ completed the syllabus.
questions.explanation: "Already" is used to show an action completed sooner than expected. कार्य पहले ही पूरा हो चुका है, यह बताने के लिए "already" आता है।

questions.question: He has not arrived _______.
questions.explanation: "Yet" is used in negative sentences to show something hasn't happened. नकारात्मक वाक्यों में 'अभी तक' के लिए "yet" का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: It is _______ cold today.
questions.explanation: "Very" is used for simple emphasis. "Very" का प्रयोग सामान्य जोर देने के लिए किया जाता है।

questions.question: The fruit is _______ ripe to eat.
questions.explanation: "Too...to" indicates it is over-ripe. "Too...to" का अर्थ है कि फल जरूरत से ज्यादा पक गया है।

questions.question: I will go to Mumbai _______ next week.
questions.explanation: Do not use prepositions before 'next week/month/year'. 'Next week' आदि से पहले preposition का प्रयोग नहीं होता।

questions.question: She met me _______ last Monday.
questions.explanation: No preposition is required before 'last Monday'. 'Last Monday' से पहले किसी preposition की आवश्यकता नहीं है।

questions.question: I study _______ every day.
questions.explanation: 'Every day' is an adverbial phrase and doesn't need a preposition. 'Every day' के साथ preposition नहीं लगाया जाता।

questions.question: He will return _______ this evening.
questions.explanation: 'This evening' acts as an adverbial; no preposition is used. 'This evening' से पहले preposition का प्रयोग गलत है।

questions.question: You should go _______ home now.
questions.explanation: No preposition is used before "home" when using verbs of movement like go. 'Go' जैसी क्रियाओं के साथ 'home' से पहले preposition नहीं आता।

questions.question: He reached _______ the station on time.
questions.explanation: "Reach" is a transitive verb; do not use 'to' after it. "Reach" के साथ 'to' का प्रयोग नहीं किया जाता।

questions.question: I told _______ him to wait.
questions.explanation: "Tell" is followed by a direct object; no 'to' is needed. "Tell" के बाद सीधे object आता है, 'to' नहीं।

questions.question: We discussed _______ the matter for an hour.
questions.explanation: "Discuss" is a transitive verb; do not use "about" after it. "Discuss" के बाद "about" का प्रयोग व्याकरण की दृष्टि से गलत है।
